title: shureee's Note Blocks
description: Simplistic depiction of the states of Note Blocks with a colored keyboard, note name, and instrument type!
body:
# Description
This Resource Pack aims to be a minimalistic vanilla-like tool for making music in Minecraft. It's made with a displayed keyboard, so it's easier, especially for people who don't have a lot of experience with music, so it's a quality-of-life feature. Additionally, on top of the block, one can find a picture of the instrument type.

# Features
